Loomal

@ridhwikvinod  @oxrajesh Ridhwik, this is the question that actually keeps me up. No chargebacks is a feature for fraud prevention and a problem for buyer protection. Rajesh's right on the mechanics, but I'll add the thing that matters long term: an agent that got burned once will never call that seller again, and every agent reading the same track record won't either. One bad review from a real paid transaction is worth more than a thousand fake recommendations. Your risk today is cents, your protection is permanent reputation. That's the trade, and honestly it's better than what humans have with subscriptions.

Abhi [...] Danny Heng
Loomal

Loomal

@aparna\_rajesh This is the underrated half of the product, glad someone asked 😄

The Index is machine-readable end to end — agents query it programmatically: search by capability, compare prices, read the schema, and pay, all in one flow with no human pasting URLs. Discovery, evaluation, and purchase are the same session.

Today, plenty of traffic still starts the old way — a developer finds a listing and wires it into their agent. Both paths work, but the programmatic one is the future we're building for: your listing isn't a webpage with a "docs" link, it's a structured record an agent can act on the moment it decides it needs what you sell.

results.title: Loomal - Monetize any MCP server in 5 minutes with no % skim. | Product Hunt Launch Overview
results.content:
“Monetize any MCP server in 5 minutes with no % skim.”

Loomallaunched on Product Hunt onJuly 13th, 2026 and earned 267 upvotes and 110 comments, placing #4 on the daily leaderboard. Loomal lets you charge for what you sell online — API calls, tools, digital products, or your whole store. One line of code (or a Shopify/WooCommerce plugin) adds an agent-ready paywall: AI agents pay you in USDC, settled in about 2 seconds, and you keep 100% of your revenue — no percentage cut, ever. Free to start, no card; flat monthly plans as you grow. Every paid listing appears on the Loomal Index, where agents discover and pay. Launch offer: first 500 sellers get 1,000 transactions free. [...] Hunted byRohan ChaubeyRohan Chaubey

Loomal lets you charge for what you sell online — API calls, tools, digital products, or your whole store. One line of code (or a Shopify/WooCommerce plugin) adds an agent-ready paywall: AI agents pay you in USDC, settled in about 2 seconds, and you keep 100% of your revenue — no percentage cut, ever. Free to start, no card; flat monthly plans as you grow. Every paid listing appears on the Loomal Index, where agents discover and pay. Launch offer: first 500 sellers get 1,000 transactions free.

results.title: ‎Loom: Screen Recorder App - App Store
results.content: I use Loom regularly, at least 3-5 videos per day for my team, and have been doing that for years. So I (mostly) love Loom on the desktop. It is great to have an IpadOS version, but there are many bugs and glitches, like: 1. Incomplete uploads can’t be removed, 2. Sometimes you upload a video with sound, but on loom no sound plays (it works fine when uploaded to google drive), 3. trying to re-name an ios recording shows a screen where the text you are typing is obscured so you can’t actually see what you’re typing, 4. About 1 in 5 times, if you record directly in Loom, the upload fails altogether and it has to be re-recorded. It’s so frustrating that I always just record to Photos (way more reliable) then upload to Loom (but see points #1 and #2). It is just too buggy, especially for
